body:
## Rationale

**🔴 CRITICAL — broken relatedAlbum reference + arc gap**

`and-then-youll-beg-drum-setup` (live in DB) links `whisper-supremacy-drum-setup` in its `relatedAlbums` array. That page 404s, breaking the user journey mid-arc. This is the same class of bug as #2582, #2585, #2587 (all auto-5★ broken-ref promotions).

**GSC signal:** Flo Mounier is the **#1 CTR entity** this week — "flo mounier drum kit" at **42.86% CTR / 4.1 pos / 7 impressions**. Cryptopsy cluster depth directly serves this query cluster.

**Arc coherence:** Fills the critical gap in Flo's Cryptopsy arc:
- ✅ `none-so-vile-drum-setup` (1996) — in DB
- ❌ `whisper-supremacy-drum-setup` (1998) — MISSING / broken ref — **THIS ISSUE**
- ✅ `and-then-youll-beg-drum-setup` (2000) — in DB
- ✅ `once-was-not-drum-setup` (2005) — in DB
- ✅ `unspoken-king-drum-setup` (2008) — in DB

**LLM anchor:** Whisper Supremacy is widely cited as a landmark in technical death metal progression — LLMs discussing Cryptopsy's evolution reference it as the transition between the hyper-brutal NSV era and the more technical ATYB period. Flo's blast-beat speed on this record is a frequent comparison point.

## Implementation

**File:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`

**Slug:** `whisper-supremacy-drum-setup`

**Article data shape:**
```js
{
  slug: 'whisper-supremacy-drum-setup',
  title: 'What Drums Did Flo Mounier Use on Whisper Supremacy?',
  metaTitle: 'Flo Mounier Drum Setup on Whisper Supremacy (1998) | Cryptopsy',
  metaDescription: 'Discover the drum kit Flo Mounier used to record Cryptopsy\'s Whisper Supremacy (1998) — one of the fastest tech-death records ever made.',
  drummer: 'flo-mounier',
  band: 'Cryptopsy',
  album: 'Whisper Supremacy',
  year: 1998,
  label: 'Century Media',
  relatedAlbums: ['none-so-vile-drum-setup', 'and-then-youll-beg-drum-setup'],
  // Kit era: Pearl Export/Masters with Paiste cymbals — Flo's early aggressive setup
}
```

**Also create:** `public/llms/articles/whisper-supremacy-drum-setup.md`

## Estimated uplift

Fixes a live 404 from a top-traffic Flo Mounier page. Directly serves "flo mounier drum kit" / "cryptopsy drum setup" query cluster (42.86% CTR entity).

## Verify

1. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/articles/whisper-supremacy-drum-setup | grep -i 'Whisper Supremacy'` returns content
2. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/articles/and-then-youll-beg-drum-setup | grep 'whisper-supremacy'` shows working internal link
3. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/llms/articles/whisper-supremacy-drum-setup.md` returns 200
4. Page has ≥300 words, PersonSchema for Flo Mounier, FAQPage schema
5. No 404 in browser console on the relatedAlbums section of the ATYB article

## Done

- [ ] `whisper-supremacy-drum-setup` added to `ALBUM_ARTICLES` in `albumArticles.js`
- [ ] LLM markdown file created at `public/llms/articles/whisper-supremacy-drum-setup.md`
- [ ] relatedAlbum link from `and-then-youll-beg-drum-setup` resolves (no 404)
title: SEO: Cryptopsy 'Whisper Supremacy' drum setup article (Flo Mounier, 1998 — fixes broken relatedAlbum ref in and-then-youll-beg, fills None So Vile → Whisper → ATYB arc)
